prompt: A cinematic ancient Egypt portrait of a glamorous queen-like woman kneeling on warm desert sand beside a large black panther in the courtyard of a sandstone temple. The woman has jet black long wavy hair, medium-brown skin, and wears an ornate Egyptian gold headband with a central turquoise jewel and sun-disc detail, long rectangular gold earrings, a wide layered Egyptian collar in gold and blue, multiple gold armbands and bracelets, and a revealing ivory-and-gold draped outfit with gemstone ornaments, delicate gold chain adornments across the torso, a jeweled belt, and strappy sandals. Her pose is elegant and grounded, one hand resting on the sand, knees folded to one side, body angled slightly toward the viewer. Beside her is 1 sleek black panther with subtle rosette patterning and bright amber eyes, lying sphinx-like in the foreground, calm, regal, and protective. The setting includes 3 massive carved temple columns in the background with hieroglyphic and animal relief details, softly out of focus. Golden-hour sunlight, warm sandstone tones, realistic skin and fabric textures, dramatic yet natural shadows, shallow depth of field, ultra-detailed, photorealistic, luxurious, mythic atmosphere, centered vertical composition, full-body seated figure with animal companion.
